title: amaryllis × compacta
intro: Amaryllis × compacta is a hybrid plant derived from the amaryllis family, known for its compact and upright growth habit, producing large, trumpet-shaped flowers in shades of red, pink, and white. Amaryllis × compacta has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant's medicinal properties also contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Amaryllis × compacta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for various medicinal and therapeutic purposes.
